title: quay.io/libpod/validatepr is out of date
body:
### Issue Description

We bumped go.mod to v1.25.5, but the validatepr image only includes 1.25.4, so all `make *-in-container` (and `make validatepr`) are not working.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. `make vendor-in-container`


### Describe the results you received

`(go: go.mod requires go >= 1.25.5 (running go 1.25.4; GOTOOLCHAIN=local))`

### Describe the results you expected

Vendoring actually happens

### podman info output

```yaml
Not version dependent
```

### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

None

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

Additional environment details

### Additional information

Additional information like issue happens only occasionally or issue happens with a particular architecture or on a particular setting

comments.body: I repushed, but it still seems broken. Eyes on this would be appreciated.
All images repushed and rebuilt, seems to be working now.
